# Kristiansen Utvikling

> Freelance webutvikler i Norge — skreddersydde nettsider, nettbutikker og apper med Next.js og React.

Kristiansen Utvikling is a Norwegian freelance web development studio offering custom websites, e-commerce solutions, SEO optimization, and app development. Based in Norway, serving Norwegian and international clients.

## Services
- Web development with Next.js and React
- E-commerce and online store development
- SEO optimization and technical SEO
- App development (web and mobile)
- Website redesign and rebuilds
- Hosting, maintenance, and ongoing support

## Projects
- Holidaze: Modern booking platform for holiday homes with interactive maps (Next.js / React)
- Kragerø Naturstein: Professional website for a Norwegian natural stone supplier (WordPress / SEO)
- Nora Marketing: Marketing agency website focused on conversions (Next.js / Marketing)
- Droomvilla Spanje: Holiday villa rental site for the Spanish market (Web / Travel)
- Bygg Mester Danielsen: Website for a Norwegian construction company (Web / Construction)
